use_cases: Landing page hero sections with animated gradient backgrounds for maximum visual impact
SaaS and product marketing pages requiring eye-catching header sections
Portfolio and personal website hero sections with fluid animation effects
Marketing campaign landing pages with premium animated aesthetics
Onboarding or welcome screens with immersive gradient backgrounds
ai_summary: A hero section component featuring an animated aurora gradient background with continuously morphing purple, blue, and pink colors using Framer Motion. The component supports customizable title, description, and dual action buttons (primary/secondary) with a full-screen responsive layout. Designed for landing pages requiring high visual impact and premium aesthetics.
